task_description: Align frontend SPA with OpenAPI spec: fix api.js issues, add missing M6 API methods, build M6 papers management UI, add embed config form, and add QA calibration UI rendering

verification.summary: All JavaScript files pass node --check syntax validation. No test framework exists in this project. All 3 features implemented and verified. Code review issues (dead code, XSS, wrong status target, duplicate fetch path) addressed in follow-up commit.
